name: ValuesWithSpatialFilter
description: Returns a single column's values for rows intersecting a spatial filter boundary, with coordinate correction. Output is a DataTree (branch per row) parallel to CRC_GeometriesWithSpatialFilter.

inputParameters.name: schema
inputParameters.description: Schema where the table is located

inputParameters.name: N
inputParameters.description: Value to replace NULL items with

inputParameters.name: spatial_filter
inputParameters.description: Grasshopper geometries to act as spatial filter (list — all polygons dissolved into a single mask)

inputParameters.name: SRID
inputParameters.description: Spatial reference identifier for the spatial filter (default 4326)

outputParameters.name: values
outputParameters.description: Values as DataTree (one branch per row, ORDER BY pk)

outputParameters.name: pk
outputParameters.description: Primary keys as DataTree (parallel to values, one branch per row)

outputParameters.name: queries
outputParameters.description: All SQL statements executed against the database (structured)
